raw.title: Of Hidden Futures and Star-Shaped Worlds
raw.excerpt:
Writer and activist Lara-Lane Plambeck describes her efforts, along with the artist collective RE-PEAT, to create alternative maps and unearth more embedded ways of seeing and preserving endangered peatlands.

The post Of Hidden Futures and Star-Shaped Worlds appeared first on Dark Mountain.

llm_processed.summary: Exploring hidden futures and the potential for radical transformation in the face of ecological collapse.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This enables a bridge between speculative fiction and regenerative economics by highlighting the potential of reordered systems for sustenance of human flourishing.
